{{Quote|I finally found a buyer for my centuries-old Core World Arms pulse-blast rifle. Obviously such a valuable item must be hand-delivered.|A commoner|<ref name="SWG">{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=terminal||Antique Blaster Rifle}}</ref>}}
The '''pulse-blast rifle''' was the predecessor of [[Pulse-wave blaster|pulse-wave weapons]] and the modern [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]]. It emitted a constant low hum when loaded and was erratic at longer ranges.
